features: 【Complete Christmas Wrapping Solution】Each set includes 6 sheets of high-quality 70x50cm folding wrapping paper, 6 matching greeting cards, and 1 rolls of elegant satin ribbon. Everything you need to beautifully wrap your Christmas gifts, saving you time and hassle during the busy festive season

【 Thick Paper 】 Unlike thin and cheap packaging paper, our glossy Christmas wrapping paper is thick, tough, and not easily torn or damaged due to slight scratching. Even if the gift box has sharp corners, it can ensure that the packaging is intact and beautiful, providing solid protection for the gift

【6 Unique & Festive Designs】Features a variety of 6 enchanting Christmas patterns including classic red Santa, playful reindeer, snowy landscapes, cheerful snowmen, and elegant gold foil accents. Perfect for wrapping all family gifts, from kids' toys to sophisticated adult presents

【Bonus Cards & Ribbons for a Perfect Finish】Elevate your gift-giving with 6 included Christmas cards for heartfelt messages and 1 rolls of soft, easy-to-tie ribbon for creating gorgeous bows. This complete set makes your Xmas presents truly unforgettable

【Easy to Fold & Eco-Conscious Choice】The paper comes neatly folded for compact storage and effortless use. We are committed to sustainability; our Christmas packaging paper is made from recycled materials and is fully recyclable, letting you celebrate responsibly
